lore.english:
Demon. A high-ranking oni warrior from Nyogonoshima, and the boss of "Kibushu", one of the most prominent crime syndicates in Tokyo Kingdom. She stands in sharp opposition to Nomad, with whom she vies for power in the Tokyo Kingdom, yet she shares a drinking‑buddy relationship with Francis, the head of the Francis Family.

A master of lightning‑fast swordsmanship, her speed is said to rival that of Igawa Asagi, the mightiest of the Taimanins. She also possesses a powerful regenerative ability, earning her the nickname “Ravana the Immortal” on Nyogonoshima, where she is regarded with fear.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&SPD] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase SPD of All allies by 5% in All Battles
skills.description_readable: Increase SPD of All allies by 5% in All Battles

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Demon Blade: Fleeting Wind[-]
skills.description:
Fires a sword aura at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1250102]%)[-] [&HealRateDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1250102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1250102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Fires a sword aura at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with (65%) Heal Reduction at a 20% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Demon Blade: Raging Wind[-]
skills.description:
Fires a powerful sword aura at the enemy consecutively [A:12502] time(s).
If the character's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]70%[-] or more [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore], grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1250202]%)[-] [&AccUp] to self.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1250202] turn(s)
If the character's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]70%[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore], grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1250203]%)[-] [&CriDmgUp] to self.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1250203] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Fires a powerful sword aura at the enemy consecutively [A:12502] time(s).
If the character's HP is 70% or more before the attack, grants (30%) ACC UP to self.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the character's HP is less than 70% before the attack, grants (60%) CRIT DMG UP to self.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Raging Wind, Clear Moon[-]
skills.description:
Slashes the enemy with Iaido while laughing.
[&Provocation]s the target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1250302]%[-] chance [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionBefore].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1250302] turn(s)
When defeating an enemy with this skill, gains an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddTurn].
skills.description_readable:
Slashes the enemy with Iaido while laughing.
Taunts the target at a 45% chance before the attack.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
When defeating an enemy with this skill, gains an Extra Turn.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Like the Gust[-]
skills.description:
[&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1250401]%)[-].
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], if [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_12504] is on [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime], fills the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1250402]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1250402]%[-] chance.
When attacking a [&Provocation]ed target, increases [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1250403]%)[-].
skills.description_readable:
CRIT Rate increases by (37.5%).
On Turn Start, if Like the Gust is on Cooldown, fills the Turn Gauge by (20%) at a -25% chance.
When attacking a Taunted target, increases DMG by (7.5%).

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_12502]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_12504]
skill_data.description:
[&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] for [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_12504] becomes 0.
[&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] increases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:1251401]%[-] of the character's SPD.
[&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalDamage] increases by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1251402]%)[-].
skill_data.description_readable:
Cooldown for Like the Gust becomes 0.
CRIT Rate increases by 3% of the character's SPD.
CRIT DMG increases by (5%).
